entities.description: A root-knot nematode used to test resistance in Cicer species and chickpea

entities.name: DAMAGE INDEX
entities.description: A 1-9 scale used to evaluate resistance based on gall number, size, and area

entities.description: A measure of nematode damage used as a component of the damage index

entities.name: GALL SIZE
entities.description: A measure of nematode damage used as a component of the damage index

entities.description: A measure of nematode damage used as a component of the damage index

entities.name: EGG SAC COUNT
entities.description: The number of egg sacs counted as a measure of nematode damage

entities.name: NEMATODE DAMAGE
entities.description: The state of being affected by Meloidogyne javanica
